mano_cua.result_summary: 应用存在致命运行时错误(ReferenceError: Cannot access ReactGrid before initialization at PartialArea.tsx:11)，页面完全空白，#root div为空，无法测试下拉单元格功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: ReactGrid app crashes with ReferenceError: Cannot access ReactGrid before initialization (circular dependency issue at PartialArea.tsx:11). Page is blank, #root div empty, React app fails to mount.
